coreResponsibility.description: A UI plugin for the Kaltura Player that displays media entry information (name, description, creator, creation date, play count) in an overlay panel accessible via an info icon in the player upper bar.

featureOwnership: Creation date display with relative time formatting (Today, X days ago, X months ago, More than a year ago)
Play count display with K-formatting for thousands
dataHandling: Entry metadata from player.sources.metadata (name, description, createdAt, plays, creatorId, userId)
Plugin configuration state (useCreatorId, showUser, showCreatedAt, showPlays)
Player size state for responsive rendering

upstream.name: @playkit-js/kaltura-player-js
upstream.description: Core Kaltura player that provides entry metadata, UI framework (Preact), plugin lifecycle, and player state

upstream.name: @playkit-js/ui-managers
upstream.description: Provides UpperBarManager service for registering the info icon button in the player upper bar

upstream.name: @playkit-js/common
upstream.description: Shared components including OverlayPortal and A11yWrapper for accessible UI components

downstream.name: Kaltura Player UI
downstream.description: The info overlay is rendered within the player's GuiArea using the player's component system

externalApis.name: sanitize-html
externalApis.description: Third-party library for sanitizing HTML content in entry descriptions to prevent XSS

entryPoints.description: Plugin registration entry point - registers PlaykitJsInfoPlugin with the Kaltura player
Main plugin class - contains core logic for info overlay, icon management, and event handling
Info overlay component - renders entry metadata in an overlay panel

configurationOptions.useCreatorId: boolean - Whether to display creatorId (true) or userId (false) as the creator. Default: true
configurationOptions.showUser: boolean - Whether to show user/creator data. Default: true
configurationOptions.showCreatedAt: boolean - Whether to show creation date. Default: true
configurationOptions.showPlays: boolean - Whether to show play count. Default: true
